story.text:
# ✨ Conceal Name
**🪡 → 🌑(name) → 🧥(role-only)**
*pallia · weaving · V28*

Conceal the name while the role goes out. The other half of the cloak's discipline; paired with publish-role.

> To conceal the name is not to hide. It is to choose what travels.

*Keywords:* conceal · name · selective-disclosure · v28 · eight-properties
